recommendations.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage

recommendations.title: Sweet Sweetback's Baadasssss Song
recommendations.overview: After saving a Black Panther from some racist cops, a black male prostitute goes on the run from "the man" with the help of the ghetto community and some disillusioned Hells Angels.

recommendations.title: Undercover
recommendations.overview: Basque Country, Spain, late nineties. A young policewoman manages to infiltrate the ruthless terrorist gang ETA.

recommendations.title: Drumline: A New Beat
recommendations.overview: A girl from New York attends a college in Atlanta to join their once-famous marching band.

recommendations.title: Nine Queens
recommendations.overview: Two con artists try to swindle a stamp collector by selling him a sheet of counterfeit rare stamps, the "nine queens".

recommendations.title: Federal Bank Heist
recommendations.overview: "The Baron" wanted to commit the perfect heist involving 3 tons of money and no violence. For this he would need the right people willing to get 1 million dollars to take part in this job. Based on true events, in 2005, 168,000,000 Brazilian Real (al

recommendations.title: Thursday
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Action, Comedy, Crime, Drama, Mystery
recommendations.overview: A former Los Angeles drug dealer moves far away to Texas, making a new life for himself as a married architect in the suburbs. His old crime partner unexpectedly shows up with heroin and gangster business, attracting a slew of violent unsavory charac

recommendations.title: Highlander III: The Sorcerer
recommendations.overview: Deceived that he had won the Prize, Connor MacLeod wanders through the world; however, he is awakened from his peaceful life when an entombed immortal magician, Kane, escapes and comes seeking the Highlander.

recommendations.title: Straight from the Barrio
recommendations.overview: A young drug dealer falls in love while facing disruption among the men in his gang, and being offered a career as a Reggaetón singer.

recommendations.title: Shot Caller
recommendations.overview: A newly-released prison gangster is forced by the leaders of his gang to orchestrate a major crime with a brutal rival gang on the streets of Southern California.
